reviewers.label: Architecture Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on architecture, boundaries, data flow, maintainability, coupling, and whether the design has a clean separation between core and runtime.

reviewers.label: Implementation Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on implementation realism, code-level sequencing, API shape, edge cases, and whether an agent could execute the plan without missing context.

reviewers.label: QA / Test Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on tests, acceptance criteria, regression risk, integration coverage, UI/server testability, and the cheapest useful proof of correctness.

reviewers.label: Security / Privacy Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on secrets, local API exposure, raw transcript leakage, prompt injection, provider data controls, authentication, and unsafe defaults.

reviewers.label: Release / Ops Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on rollout, failure modes, logging, observability, rollback, operational simplicity, and how the plan behaves under partial failure.

reviewers.label: Budget / Efficiency Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on cost efficiency, token caps, minimizing retries, using cheap models safely, and identifying places where expensive reviewers are unnecessary.

reviewers.label: Long-Context Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on cross-plan consistency, missed dependencies, long-context assumptions, duplicated responsibilities, and whether the overall workflow fits together.

reviewers.label: Agentic Workflow Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on agentic workflow risk, task decomposition, autonomy boundaries, UI/server event flow, and whether reviewer execution is predictable.
